idea-plugin.name: Switch
idea-plugin.description:
Switches the thing under the caret: booleans (true/false), single-character pairs (+/-, >/<), and string quote styles. Configurable globally and per language.

Actions: Switch the Thing Under Caret (id: dev.bartoszmaka.switch.SwitchAction) and Switch the Thing Under Caret (Backwards) (id: dev.bartoszmaka.switch.SwitchBackwardsAction) for reverse cycling. Bind via Settings → Keymap, or map them in IdeaVim: 
nnoremap <leader>t :action dev.bartoszmaka.switch.SwitchAction<CR>
nnoremap <leader>T :action dev.bartoszmaka.switch.SwitchBackwardsAction<CR>

action.description: Switch boolean, operator, or quote under cursor
Switch boolean, operator, or quote under cursor in reverse order
